name: COLD VR
short_description: Time is your greatest weapon! Move to slow it down, stop, and risk everything.
detailed_description:
Cold VR: Sub Zero Update has an iceberg-sized host of updates, including bHaptic integration, new levels, and use of enemy weapons:

  • Five new levels added to the game to the game

  • A new streamlined campaign experience with optional backrooms horror levels

  • Harness weapons dropped by defeated foes, and for some challenges, depend entirely on this new mechanic

  • Players can now feel the chilling rush of COLD VR’s touch coursing through their bodies, as the game is now fully integrated with the full-body haptics suit by bHaptics

  • Older levels have been tweaked and existing levels optimised and rebalanced to improve flow

  • General fixes and improvements to areas such as enemy AI, UI, main menu locomotion and balancing

Keep moving.   You’ve got to keep moving.    Because in the high adrenaline shooter Cold VR, when you slow down, time goes faster, and so does the relentless enemy AI.   And you really don’t want that to happen.

COLD VR is an exhilarating virtual reality game that puts you in control of time.   Stay on the move to outwit and outmanoeuvre the relentless enemy AI. The fate of the virtual world rests in your hands! Time is your greatest weapon. Move to slow it down, stop, and risk everything.  

Designed for those who crave a challenge and love the rush of adrenaline. As you progress through the chillingly beautiful environments, you'll face not only numerous, more powerful enemies, including those in the scary Backrooms levels, but also environmental hazards such as deadly lasers, moving platforms, and unexpected surprises for those daring enough to explore.  With its twisting mechanics, this game will turn you into an unstoppable machine as you adapt and overcome challenges in each level.

  • Over 40 levels including the feared backroom levels

  • Step into the shoes of the protagonist in a unique blend of live-action and in-game storytelling.

  • Your choices will determine humanity's fate.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
